hero.subtitle: Canadian International School Tangier — Nurturing global citizens with Canadian curriculum and international standards

about.label: About Us
about.title: Shaping Tomorrow's Leaders Today
about.description: Canadian International School Tangier stands as a beacon of educational excellence in North Africa, offering a comprehensive Canadian curriculum that prepares students for global success.
about.ontarioDesc: 100% English instruction with Ontario curriculum standards
about.ministryDesc: Students registered with Ministry of Education of Ontario
about.worldClassDesc: Our trilingual program in English, French, and Arabic ensures students develop strong linguistic skills while maintaining cultural connections. We combine innovative teaching methods with traditional values to create well-rounded, confident individuals.
about.excellenceDesc: We pursue academic excellence through rigorous Canadian curriculum standards and innovative teaching methods.
about.communityDesc: We foster a supportive, inclusive community where every student feels valued and empowered to succeed.
about.globalDesc: We prepare students to become responsible global citizens with cross-cultural understanding.

academics.label: Academics
academics.title: Academic Programs
academics.subtitle: Discover our comprehensive educational programs designed to nurture excellence from early childhood through university preparation.
academics.kindergartenDesc: Greenbridge Academy — our dedicated kindergarten campus — will open in 2027, offering young learners a nurturing environment to discover the joy of education through play-based learning.
academics.primaryDesc: Building strong foundations with Ontario curriculum while fostering critical thinking and creativity.
academics.middleDesc: Transition years focused on deeper subject knowledge and developing independent learning skills.
academics.highDesc: Preparing students for global success with rigorous Ontario curriculum and university preparation.
academics.f_ministry: Ministry of Education of Ontario registered

campus.label: Campus Life
campus.title: Beyond the Classroom
campus.subtitle: Discover the vibrant community and diverse activities that make CIST a truly enriching experience.

news.label: News & Updates
news.title: News & Events
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest happenings, achievements, and upcoming events.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.successMsg: Thank you for contacting us. We'll respond soon.
contact.errorMsg: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Nurturing global citizens with Canadian curriculum and international standards since 2010.
footer.newsletterDesc: Stay updated with the latest news and events from CIST.
footer.rights: Canadian International School Tangier. All rights reserved.

map.label: Find Us
map.title: Visit Our Campus
map.subtitle: Located in the beautiful city of Tangier, our campus is easily accessible and welcomes visitors for tours.
